name: Russian Daily
tagline: Ten topical Russian headlines a day — one word highlighted, with English
description: Single-user web app: each calendar day (Europe/Moscow) shows 10 news-style Russian headlines. Each item highlights one vocabulary word and shows its English gloss plus a full English headline translation. Play pronunciation for the full headline or the highlighted word (OpenAI TTS when API key is set; otherwise browser speech where available). Thumb up or down to steer topic mix for the next batch.

env_vars.description: Optional. When set, daily batches use gpt-4o-mini and headline/word audio uses OpenAI TTS; otherwise a static pool and browser speech (where available).
